detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Kyoshi._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Kyoshi.sol#361-459):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (Kyoshi.sol#431)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Kyoshi.sol#473-485)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (Kyoshi.sol#439)
		- _FeeAddress1.transfer(amount / 2) (Kyoshi.sol#493)
		- _FeeAddress2.transfer(amount / 2) (Kyoshi.sol#495)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee,isBuy) (Kyoshi.sol#457)
		- _owned[address(this)] = _owned[address(this)] + team (Kyoshi.sol#565)
		- _owned[sender] = _owned[sender] - amount (Kyoshi.sol#539)
		- _owned[recipient] = _owned[recipient] + transferAmount (Kyoshi.sol#541)
	Kyoshi._owned (Kyoshi.sol#175) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Kyoshi._takeTeam(uint256) (Kyoshi.sol#563-567)
	- Kyoshi._transferStandard(address,address,uint256,uint256) (Kyoshi.sol#535-547)
	- Kyoshi.balanceOf(address) (Kyoshi.sol#285-289)
	- Kyoshi.constructor(address,address) (Kyoshi.sol#263-281)

elements.name: require(bool,string)(cooldown[to].buy < block.timestamp + (15),Your buy cooldown has not expired.)
require(bool,string)(cooldown[from].buy < block.timestamp + (15),Your sell cooldown has not expired.)

detectors.description:
Kyoshi._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Kyoshi.sol#361-459) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(block.timestamp != _launchedAt,pls no snip) (Kyoshi.sol#383)
	- (_launchedAt + (86400)) > block.timestamp (Kyoshi.sol#385)
	- (_launchedAt + (120)) > block.timestamp (Kyoshi.sol#397)
	- require(bool,string)(cooldown[to].buy < block.timestamp + (15),Your buy cooldown has not expired.) (Kyoshi.sol#401)
	- require(bool,string)(cooldown[from].buy < block.timestamp + (15),Your sell cooldown has not expired.) (Kyoshi.sol#415)
detectors.markdown:
[Kyoshi._transfer(address,address,uint256)](Kyoshi.sol#L361-L459) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- [require(bool,string)(block.timestamp != _launchedAt,pls no snip)](Kyoshi.sol#L383)
	- [(_launchedAt + (86400)) > block.timestamp](Kyoshi.sol#L385)
	- [(_launchedAt + (120)) > block.timestamp](Kyoshi.sol#L397)
	- [require(bool,string)(cooldown[to].buy < block.timestamp + (15),Your buy cooldown has not expired.)](Kyoshi.sol#L401)
	- [require(bool,string)(cooldown[from].buy < block.timestamp + (15),Your sell cooldown has not expired.)](Kyoshi.sol#L415)

detectors.description: Kyoshi._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Kyoshi.sol#361-459) has a high cyclomatic complexity (12).

Version constraint ^0.8.10 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.10 (Kyoshi.sol#35)
